name: DA PAPER BOY
short_description: Get locked and loaded as 3 Teens run through the town delivering mail in a whole new modern way! As you generate points on the leaderboard while dodging OG granny and the neighborhood watch. Only one question remains... Are you the best paper boy or paper girl? Let your score tell it all!
detailed_description:
A group of teen prankster makers were given a second chance to do something positive in society, so they decided to bring back the paper delivery route. To not only bring back an extinct job but to give other teens jobs, but little did the mayor know the big mistake she made....

In this debut:

Shoot main in the safe zone for greater points

Tactical gameplay

3 Main pickup to help invade enemies

Cool BMX bikes and skins

5 Star aggro system

Hidden traps to keep you on your toes

Survival and leaderboard system

Loads of fun and much more!

BE THE BEST PAPER DELIVERY OR THE WORSE!
